highlights.description: Unified CLI with 16 commands for PDF and Office document operations
MCP server with 12 tools for AI agent integration via omniskill pattern
PDF merge, split, and page extraction capabilities
Batch conversion with glob patterns and progress reporting
XLSX and PPTX info commands for spreadsheet and presentation analysis

added.description: Unified Cobra CLI with 16 commands: pdf2docx, docx2pdf, docx-metadata, pptx-metadata, merge, split, extract, pagecount, batch-pdf2docx, batch-docx2pdf, xlsx-info, pptx-info, mcp, version, help, completion
MCP server with 12 tools using omniskill pattern for AI agent integration
PDF merge functionality via `MergePDFFiles()` combining multiple PDFs into one
PDF split functionality via `SplitPDFFile()` extracting each page as a separate file
PDF page extraction via `ExtractPDFPages()` for specific page ranges
PDF page count via `GetPDFPageCount()` returning total pages
Batch PDF to DOCX conversion with glob pattern support
Batch DOCX to PDF conversion with glob pattern support
Progress callback support for batch operations using `mogo/fmt/progress`
XLSX info command returning sheet names and count
PPTX info command returning slide count
Typed methods on Skill struct for type safety: `ConvertPDFToDocx()`, `ConvertDocxToPDF()`, `MergePDFs()`, `SplitPDF()`, etc.
`ExpandGlobPatterns()` and `FilterByExtension()` helper functions for batch operations
`BatchConversionResult` type with success/failure tracking and error details

documentation.description: Comprehensive README.md with all 16 CLI commands and 12 MCP tools documented
MkDocs site with getting-started, CLI reference, MCP server, library reference, and examples pages

dependencies.description: Add `github.com/grokify/mogo/fmt/progress` for progress bar support in batch operations

highlights.description: License support for UniPDF with environment variable configuration
New docx2pdf CLI command for DOCX to PDF conversion

added.description: License support for UniPDF via `SetLicenseAPIKey()` and `SetMeteredKey()`
`SetMeteredKeyEnv()` for loading metered key from `UNIDOC_LICENSE_API_KEY` environment variable
`cmd/docx2pdf` CLI command for DOCX to PDF conversion

fixed.description: Fix G115 integer overflow conversion lint warning in unipdfutil

highlights.description: Dependency updates for unipdf, unioffice, and mogo
Add unipdfutil package for PDF operations including PDF to DOCX conversion

added.description: `unipdfutil` package moved from github.com/grokify/goimage with PDF to DOCX conversion

highlights.description: Initial release with Office document metadata extraction for DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX files

added.description: `uniofficeutil` package for Office document operations
`ReadFileMetadata()` for extracting metadata from DOCX files
`ReadFileMetadataPresentation()` for extracting metadata from PPTX files
`ExportMetadata` struct for unified metadata representation

documentation.description: README.md with installation and usage instructions
